requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Mauritius Fire Services and NFPA 855 Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——毛里求斯消防服务及NFPA 855要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——模里西斯消防服務及NFPA 855要求

summary.en: Fire safety for buildings and industrial installations in Mauritius falls under the Ministry of Public Infrastructure and Land Transport and the Mauritius Fire and Rescue Service (MFRS), operating under the Fire Services Act. All commercial and industrial facilities require fire authority clearance before commissioning. Mauritius's fire safety technical framework is IEC/BS-aligned by legacy; NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) is the internationally dominant BESS fire-installation code widely referenced in IEC-aligned project specifications. Formal adoption of NFPA 855 by the MFRS specifically for stationary BESS has not been confirmed from publicly accessible official Mauritius sources as of the dataset date — this is a high-priority gap requiring direct verification with MFRS and the project authority before design is finalised. CEB tender specifications for utility-scale BESS projects are expected to reference NFPA 855 or equivalent international fire-installation standards given Mauritius's IEC/BS regulatory alignment. Additionally, Mauritius's coastal island environment — including exposure to cyclones (Category 4 design wind speeds apply to Mauritius per national building codes) and salt-mist corrosion — imposes site-specific installation requirements for outdoor BESS enclosures and suppression systems that may exceed standard NFPA 855 baseline provisions.
summary.zh: 毛里求斯建筑和工业装置的消防安全由基础设施和土地运输部及毛里求斯消防救援服务（MFRS）负责，依据《消防服务法》运作。所有商业和工业设施在投入使用前均须取得消防当局许可。毛里求斯的消防安全技术框架传统上与IEC/BS对齐；NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）是国际上占主导地位的BESS消防安装规范，在IEC对齐的项目规格中被广泛引用。截至本数据集日期，MFRS专门针对固定式BESS正式采纳NFPA 855尚未从可公开获取的毛里求斯官方来源得到确认——这是一个高优先级差距，须在设计最终确定前直接向MFRS和项目主管机关核实。鉴于毛里求斯的IEC/BS监管对齐，CEB公用事业规模BESS项目的招标规格预计将引用NFPA 855或同等国际消防安装标准。此外，毛里求斯的沿海岛屿环境——包括台风暴露（毛里求斯国家建筑规范适用4级设计风速）和盐雾腐蚀——对户外BESS机柜和抑制系统提出可能超出NFPA 855标准基准规定的现场专属安装要求。
summary.zht: 模里西斯建築和工業裝置的消防安全由基礎設施和土地運輸部及模里西斯消防救援服務（MFRS）負責，依據《消防服務法》運作。所有商業和工業設施在投入使用前均須取得消防當局許可。模里西斯的消防安全技術框架傳統上與IEC/BS對齊；NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）是國際上佔主導地位的BESS消防安裝規範，在IEC對齊的項目規格中被廣泛引用。截至本數據集日期，MFRS專門針對固定式BESS正式採納NFPA 855尚未從可公開獲取的模里西斯官方來源得到確認——這是一個高優先級差距，須在設計最終確定前直接向MFRS和項目主管機關核實。鑑於模里西斯的IEC/BS監管對齊，CEB公用事業規模BESS項目的招標規格預計將引用NFPA 855或同等國際消防安裝標準。此外，模里西斯的沿海島嶼環境——包括颱風暴露（模里西斯國家建築規範適用4級設計風速）和鹽霧腐蝕——對戶外BESS機箱和抑制系統提出可能超出NFPA 855標準基準規定的現場專屬安裝要求。

standards_or_laws: Fire Services Act (Mauritius) — statutory basis for MFRS fire authority clearance for commercial and industrial facilities

NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (internationally dominant BESS fire-installation code; MFRS formal adoption specifically for BESS unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with MFRS)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)
IEC 60721-3-4 / IEC 60068 — Environmental classification and testing — salt-mist and coastal exposure classes relevant to outdoor BESS enclosures in Mauritius

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review procedures. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements for stationary BESS in power systems. Project-level fire safety in China is governed by local fire authority (消防救援机构) approval procedures based on the Fire Protection Law of the People's Republic of China. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Mauritius MFRS or CEB as equivalent to NFPA 855-based fire-safety installation requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with NFPA 855-aligned design documentation for MFRS and CEB review. Additionally, Chinese fire-safety standards do not address the cyclone wind-load and salt-mist corrosion environment specific to Mauritius, which must be addressed through supplementary site-specific engineering.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查程序相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023涵盖包括消防相关要求在内的电力系统固定式BESS系统级安全。中国的项目级消防安全由地方消防救援机构依据《中华人民共和国消防法》的审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被毛里求斯MFRS或CEB认可为等同于基于NFPA 855的消防安全安装要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在MFRS和CEB审查中补充符合NFPA 855要求的设计文件。此外，中国消防安全标准未涉及毛里求斯特有的台风风载和盐雾腐蚀环境，须通过补充的现场专属工程来解决。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查程序相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023涵蓋包括消防相關要求在內的電力系統固定式BESS系統級安全。中國的項目級消防安全由地方消防救援機構依據《中華人民共和國消防法》的審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被模里西斯MFRS或CEB認可為等同於基於NFPA 855的消防安全安裝要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在MFRS和CEB審查中補充符合NFPA 855要求的設計文件。此外，中國消防安全標準未涉及模里西斯特有的颱風風載和鹽霧腐蝕環境，須通過補充的現場專屬工程來解決。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
Fire Protection Law of the People's Republic of China — statutory basis for Chinese local fire authority approval

gap.en: Gap: MFRS fire safety clearance is a mandatory installation gate for all commercial and industrial BESS installations in Mauritius. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy Mauritius MFRS or CEB NFPA-based requirements. Additionally, Mauritius's coastal island environment introduces site-specific requirements not covered by Chinese fire safety standards. Exporters and project teams should: (a) confirm directly with MFRS whether NFPA 855 has been formally adopted as the applicable code for stationary BESS installations in Mauritius and identify any Mauritius-specific derogations or additional requirements; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with NFPA 855 — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) ensure fire-suppression system equipment is certified by an internationally recognised testing laboratory acceptable to MFRS; (d) address cyclone wind-load (Category 4 design wind speed) and salt-mist corrosion derating requirements for outdoor BESS enclosures and suppression system components; (e) engage a qualified fire protection engineer familiar with Mauritius building regulations and MFRS procedures for design review and clearance application before commissioning.
gap.zh: 差距：MFRS消防安全许可是毛里求斯所有商业及工业BESS装置的强制安装门槛。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足毛里求斯MFRS或CEB基于NFPA的要求。此外，毛里求斯的沿海岛屿环境提出了中国消防安全标准未覆盖的现场专属要求。出口商和项目团队应：（a）直接向MFRS确认NFPA 855是否已正式采纳为毛里求斯固定式BESS装置的适用规范，并确定任何毛里求斯专项豁免或额外要求；（b）准备符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离；（c）确保消防抑制系统设备经MFRS认可的国际知名测试实验室认证；（d）针对户外BESS机柜和抑制系统部件，解决台风风载（4级设计风速）和盐雾腐蚀降额要求；（e）在调试前聘请熟悉毛里求斯建筑法规和MFRS程序的合格消防工程师进行设计审查和许可申请。
gap.zht: 差距：MFRS消防安全許可是模里西斯所有商業及工業BESS裝置的強制安裝門檻。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足模里西斯MFRS或CEB基於NFPA的要求。此外，模里西斯的沿海島嶼環境提出了中國消防安全標準未覆蓋的現場專屬要求。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）直接向MFRS確認NFPA 855是否已正式採納為模里西斯固定式BESS裝置的適用規範，並確定任何模里西斯專項豁免或額外要求；（b）準備符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離；（c）確保消防抑制系統設備經MFRS認可的國際知名測試實驗室認證；（d）針對戶外BESS機箱和抑制系統部件，解決颱風風載（4級設計風速）和鹽霧腐蝕降額要求；（e）在調試前聘請熟悉模里西斯建築法規和MFRS程序的合格消防工程師進行設計審查和許可申請。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — MFRS fire safety clearance required for all commercial and industrial facilities in Mauritius before commissioning; NFPA 855 formal adoption for stationary BESS has not been confirmed from official Mauritius sources as of dataset date — verify directly with MFRS and CEB
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

source.publisher: Mauritius Fire and Rescue Service (MFRS), Ministry of Public Infrastructure and Land Transport, Mauritius

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] MFRS fire safety clearance is a mandatory installation gate for commercial and industrial BESS in Mauritius. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy Mauritius MFRS or CEB NFPA-based requirements. Mauritius's coastal island environment additionally requires cyclone wind-load and salt-mist derating provisions not covered by Chinese standards. Engage MFRS and a qualified fire protection engineer at the earliest project stage to confirm the applicable fire code (including whether NFPA 855 is formally adopted for stationary BESS in Mauritius), coastal site-specific requirements, and design clearance procedures before committing to system layout or equipment specification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] MFRS消防安全许可是毛里求斯商业及工业BESS装置的强制安装门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足毛里求斯MFRS或CEB基于NFPA的要求。毛里求斯沿海岛屿环境还额外要求中国标准未覆盖的台风风载和盐雾降额规定。在确定系统布局或设备规格前，应在项目最早阶段与MFRS及合格消防工程师接触，确认适用消防规范（包括NFPA 855是否已在毛里求斯正式采纳用于固定式BESS）、沿海现场专属要求及设计审批程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] MFRS消防安全許可是模里西斯商業及工業BESS裝置的強制安裝門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足模里西斯MFRS或CEB基於NFPA的要求。模里西斯沿海島嶼環境還額外要求中國標準未覆蓋的颱風風載和鹽霧降額規定。在確定系統布局或設備規格前，應在項目最早階段與MFRS及合格消防工程師接觸，確認適用消防規範（包括NFPA 855是否已在模里西斯正式採納用於固定式BESS）、沿海現場專屬要求及設計審批程序。
